summary: Phase 1.3 Code Quality Improvement: Magic number constantization, app config constants definition, and code deduplication

plan_steps.title: Create lib/constants/app_constants.dart and extract magic numbers
Replace hardcoded values in all widgets with AppConstants
Create lib/constants/app_config.dart and define app configuration constants
Create lib/widgets/common/ directory and extract common widgets

risks: Existing UI layout may change (constant value adjustments may be needed)
Multiple files modified simultaneously require testing
acceptance_criteria: All hardcoded numeric values are extracted to constants
app_constants.dart and app_config.dart files are created
evaluation_notes: Foundation work with high stability importance. Existing code modification requires careful approach. Code deduplication is optional and can be done incrementally.

agent_plan.role: Plan creation and handoff artifact generation
